daily.today_energy: Your mind is buzzing with creative possibilities today. Channel that restless energy into something tangible—journaling, creating, or just having those deep convos you've been putting off. Mercury's got your back.
daily.love: There's a magnetic pull in your connections rn. Whether you're coupled up or solo, someone's noticing your vibe. Don't overthink it—just show up as your authentic self and let things unfold naturally.
daily.career: Your communication skills are peak right now. This is the moment to pitch that idea, have the conversation you've been dreading, or collaborate on something cool. Trust your instincts; they're sharper than usual.
daily.health: Your nervous system might feel a lil overstimulated—that's just your Gemini brain running at 100mph. Ground yourself with movement, whether that's dancing, walking, or stretching. Hydration is your bestie today.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is asking you to slow down and actually listen to what people are saying instead of already planning your response. Mercury's got your back, but the real magic happens when you practice presence over performance.
weekly.love: Whether you're single or coupled up, this is a week to be honest about what you actually want versus what sounds good on paper. Someone might surprise you with genuine effort—notice it.
weekly.career: Your ideas are valuable, but timing matters more than you think. Before pitching that thing, vibe-check the room first. Small moves this week set up bigger momentum later.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for consistency over intensity right now. Skip the extreme stuff and lean into what actually feels sustainable. Rest isn't lazy, it's strategic.
